likely_pain: Manual handoffs between intake, quoting, and fulfillment create slow follow-up and missed context.
latent_need: A monitored workflow that turns each inbound request into a routed, reviewable next action.

likely_pain: Sales, onboarding, and support live in separate tools, so follow-up quality depends on memory.
latent_need: A lightweight operating cadence that makes every customer promise visible before it slips.

likely_pain: Campaign ideas are captured, but repurposing and attribution happen late or not at all.
latent_need: A repeatable campaign loop that links source content to channels, leads, and outcomes.
